findings.message: New database query function get_item_by_name() has no observability instrumentation (no metrics, spans, or correlation ID logging). The query filters by Item.name which lacks a database index, making it an unbounded scan with no latency or row-count monitoring.
findings.suggestion: Add OpenTelemetry span tracing around the query execution, record query latency metrics, log with correlation ID context, and add index=True to the Item.name column in models.py to avoid full table scans.

raw_text: [{"path":"src/demo/db/repository.py","line":19,"severity":"high","message":"New database query function get_item_by_name() has no observability instrumentation (no metrics, spans, or correlation ID logging). The query filters by Item.name which lacks a database index, making it an unbounded scan with no latency or row-count monitoring.","suggestion":"Add OpenTelemetry span tracing around the query execution, record query latency metrics, log with correlation ID context, and add index=True to the Item.name column in models.py to avoid full table scans."}]
